summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WealthDock personal finance tracker. Fixed critical SelectItem bug and verified all core functionality works correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with stat cards and charts
Navigation between Dashboard, Transactions, and Investments pages
Add income entry with source selection and recurring options
Add expense entry with category selection and recurring options
Add gold investment with type and unit selection
Dashboard updates correctly with new transaction data
Delete functionality works for expenses, income, and investments
